title: Aedans Vanilla Plus
description: A Simple modpack for sharing with use of my own server.
body:
# Vanilla Plus for Minecraft 1.21.1

Enhance your Minecraft experience with subtle but impactful changes that keep the core game intact!

## Description:

Vanilla Plus is a curated mod pack that breathes new life into Minecraft without drastically changing its core gameplay. Designed to make Minecraft feel richer and more immersive, this pack introduces quality-of-life features, visual improvements, and slight tweaks to mechanics that seamlessly blend into the vanilla experience. Whether you're a veteran adventurer or a casual builder, Vanilla Plus offers enhancements that make the game feel polished and exciting while staying true to Mojang's vision.

## Features:

    Enhanced Visuals: Improved textures, lighting adjustments, and subtle animations that elevate the visual appeal of Minecraft without making it unrecognizable.
    New Biomes: Discover new but lore-friendly biomes and structures that expand your world and add a touch of mystery to your explorations.
    QoL Improvements: Useful tweaks like improved inventory management, faster crafting, and convenient HUD enhancements to make gameplay smoother.
    Expanded Gear Options: Improved backpacks and sleeping bags to make exploring that little bit easier.
    Customizable Settings: Most features come with adjustable settings so you can tailor your experience to your preferences.

## Why Vanilla Plus?

The goal is to keep Minecraft feeling familiar while offering enough new content to keep things fresh and exciting. Vanilla Plus is ideal for players who enjoy Minecraft's core gameplay but are looking for a little extra depth and polish.

## Technical Details:

    Game Version: Minecraft 1.21.1
    Performance Friendly: Carefully chosen mods to maintain smooth performance, even on lower-end systems.

Whether building, exploring, or surviving, Vanilla Plus keeps the magic of Minecraft alive while adding just the right touch of extra flavor!
